name: Cheddar & Bacon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into a bread pan in the following order: yeast mixture, flour, salt, sugar, butter, milk.
2. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock.
3. Select "white bread" setting and start the machine.
4. In hot and humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
